creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

This patch is obviously incorrect.  You completely removed post-mk inclusion 
block, thus breaking following functionality: 


Assume a port Makefile like this: 

OPTIONS=        PHP "php goodness" on 

.include <bsd.port.pre.mk> 

.if defined(WITH_PHP) 
USE_PHP=        session 
.endif 

.include <bsd.port.post.mk> 


with the old Mk/*: 
$ make showconfig 
===> The following configuration options are available for rl-0.2.7: 
PHP=on (default) "php goodness" 
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings 
$ make depends 
===>   rl-0.2.7 depends on file: /usr/local/include/php/main/php.h - found 
===>   rl-0.2.7 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/php/20090626/session.so - found 
$ 


with your new Mk/*: 
$ make showconfig 
===> The following configuration options are available for rl-0.2.7: 
PHP=on (default) "php goodness" 
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings 
$ make depends 
$
